description.value: Changing an eidolonâs evolutions is normally a slow process. As a summoner progresses in levels, his control over his eidolonâs abilities increases. But an evolutionist possesses greater power over his eidolonâs form, and is able to evolve his eidolon and its abilities to meet any challenge or face any threat as it comes up, seemingly on a whim. Mutate Eidolon (Su) At 6th level, an evolutionist can change his eidolonâs evolutions as if he had gained a level. To mutate his eidolon, the evolutionist must perform an arcane ritual that requires 24 hours of uninterrupted concentration and costs 200 gp per summoner level in material components. This ability replaces makerâs call. Evolve Base Form (Su) Starting at 8th level, whenever he gains a level, the evolutionist can change his eidolonâs base form to a new base form. Once chosen, this base form is set until the evolutionist gains another summoner level. This ability replaces transposition. Transmogrify (Sp) At 12th level, the evolutionist can cast transmogrify as a spell-like ability once per day without the need for a material component. This ability has a casting time of 1 minute. This ability replaces greater shield ally.
